judgment.summary: High-growth, high-return business trading at a significant valuation premium with thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 4.58 beat the 4.54 estimate (0.8% surprise); next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Earnings growth of 45.5% YoY demonstrates robust bottom-line expansion.
Return on equity of 29.7% shows high efficiency in generating returns.
Total cash of $11.13B provides a healthy cushion over $10.23B in total debt.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $6.69B supports strong liquidity.
negatives: PEG ratio of 5.19 indicates the stock is priced at a high premium relative to growth.
Profit margin of 3.0% shows very thin margins on revenue.
Quick ratio of 0.54 suggests limited ability to cover immediate liabilities with liquid assets.
Trailing P/E of 53.20 reflects a high valuation multiple.
